metadata.description: A marketplace of AI-powered browser automation workflows for Athena

workflows.name: e2e-test-builder
workflows.description: Autonomous Playwright E2E pipeline - uses shared app exploration and test-analysis layers before Playwright-specific authoring, review, execution, and stabilization

workflows.name: robot-automation
workflows.description: Autonomous Robot Framework (Browser library) E2E pipeline - uses shared app exploration and test-analysis layers before Robot-specific authoring, review, execution, and stabilization

workflows.name: web-bench
workflows.description: Benchmark runner for WebBench - executes real-world browser tasks and produces evaluation reports with timing and token usage

workflows.name: loop-test
workflows.description: Minimal loop test - agent does a small thing each run, then finishes after a few iterations
